posts.author: G_Askwith (Graham Askwith)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am unable to create a Hubspot integration with the following error:

“Connecting the same portal in hubspot to multiple monday users is not supported. Please delete all hubspot integrations created by other users to this portal and try again.”

The issue is we have been unable to identify which user has the integration or which board it is on.

Has anyone encountered this or figured a way to identify where the integration is?

posts.author: sureshs (Suresh Sharma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Graham Askwith:

Hubspot integration

Hello Graham, I recently sent you a message.

Thank you.

posts.author: DanCrum (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this. I’m also running into this problem.
